title: eriogonum exaltatum
intro: Eriogonum exaltatum, also known as the Upland Buckwheat or Tall Buckwheat, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, containing flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eriogonum exaltatum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote healthy digestion.
